dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your local DataSUS parquet storage.
dashboard.noDataDirBody: Pick a base folder for your local DataSUS storage. A {{folder}} subfolder will be created inside it — that's where every parquet file will live.
dashboard.noDatasetsDesc: Once you download DataSUS data into your local store, this dashboard will show file counts, storage size, and a coverage map.
dashboard.populateTimeline: Download a subsystem to populate the timeline.
dashboard.configureFirstDesc: Use the Set Data Directory button or open Settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure where DataSUS ETL stores its parquet files.
settings.folderNotWritable: Folder exists but is not writable.
settings.willBeCreated: This folder does not exist and will be created when you save.
settings.subfolderHint: A {{folder}} subfolder will be created inside this directory — that's where every parquet file lives. The base directory itself is created if it doesn't exist.
settings.dangerDesc: Destructive operations that remove data from disk. Use with care.

reset.title: Reset local storage
reset.warning: This operation is IRREVERSIBLE. All parquet files for the selected subsystems will be permanently removed from disk. You will need to re-download the data to restore them.
reset.codePrompt: To confirm, type the 4-digit code below:

query.title: Query
query.subtitle: Ad-hoc SQL against your local parquet store.
query.downloadToQuery: Run a download to query data here.
query.noDictionary: No dictionary entries for this subsystem.
query.runToSeeResults: Run a query to see results.
query.fillPctApprox: ~{{pct}}% — upper bound based on the join column. Actual value may be lower if some codes aren't present in ibge_locais.
query.distinctCountTooltip: ~{{count}} distinct values. Click to view the histogram of this column.
query.distinctCountTooltipApprox: ~{{count}} distinct values (upper bound, inherited from ibge_locais). Click to view the histogram of this column.
query.distinctCountUnknown: Distinct value count not yet computed

wizard.title: Download wizard
wizard.subtitle: Pick a subsystem, choose scope, review the estimate, and watch it run.

step1.title: Choose a subsystem
step1.subtitle: Each DataSUS subsystem has its own schema, columns, and filename convention.

step2.title: Choose scope
step2.subtitle: Set a date range (month precision) and the federative units to include. Leave UFs empty to fetch every state.
step2.simLagBody: SIM data is published with a ~2 year delay due to ICD-10 coding review. Pick a date range that ends at least two years in the past so the next step can actually find files on the DATASUS FTP. If Estimate returns 0 files, widen the range backwards.
step2.noDataForSubsystem: No data downloaded yet for this subsystem.
step2.ufsWithData: {{count}} of {{total}} UFs with data — click a row to toggle selection.
step2.nothingDownloaded: Nothing is downloaded for this subsystem yet. Pick a start month and UFs to fetch the full scope.

step3.title: Review estimate
step3.subtitle: Verify the file count and expected disk usage before kicking off.
step3.diskWarning: Estimated storage ({{needed}}) exceeds available disk space ({{free}}).

step4.title: Running
step4.subtitle: Live progress stream from the backend.
step4.noActiveRun: No active run. Start one from the previous step.
step4.preparingBody: Listing files on the DATASUS FTP and resolving the scope. For large date/UF ranges this can take a couple of minutes. The progress bar starts moving once transfers begin.
